text: this starbucks is convenient and like most of the other establishments delivers a similar experience i find it kind of funny that it s right next door to a dunkin donuts but maybe that s a benefit for those of us who don t want to pay for a scone made from organic power berries harvested from the heart of the jungles of expensivecoffeebeanland

located on the intersection at magazine and washington is this great starbucks location being on the intersection there are plenty of parking options available through out your visit there the line is always people long no matter what time i go but they usually manage to go through it pretty quickly which is nice on my last visit i wanted to try the gingerbread latte and i had a free birthday drink so when i placed my order i requested both of those the woman who took my order okayed it and along i went i paid with a different guy who ended up charging me for the drink which was supposed to free i explained that i told the other woman it was meant to be the free birthday special but he just laughed and said you have to tell me not her well she s the one that took my order so she should ve been the one to put me through the register too so that was annoying they just had no communication between the staff members and how he shrugged it off was irritating anyways i got my gingerbread latte and took a seat now this place is always busy so don t expect your ideal seating if you come too late in the day i ended up moving three times as new more preferred places to sit became available the downside to the seating is that there aren t many powerpoint available and starbucks has to know that people come to work here while they drink their coffee not a clever move the gingerbread latte was just okay it didn t taste like gingerbread at all so i was pretty disappointed but i managed to finish it off despite the lack of taste there is a wide variety of seating inside with wall seating tabled seating and a few couch seating which is nice there is also outdoor seating but during this weather it isn t recommended but would give you views of the street which is a nice distraction from the hustle and bustle from inside overall a beautiful location but the lack of communication and consideration the staff have between themselves and the customers made the visit spoiled
out of green tea in the middle of the day when it s and sunny you re better than that starbucks on the plus side after waiting minutes the barista who brought it out was super friendly

i came for the wi fi as pjs coffee has lacking wifi power just a few shops down the road there was ample seating and my regular coffee was promptly handed to me creamer bar was well stocked clean floor and loud music like all the other homogonize starbucks you have ever been too

busy and central location makes this a coffee stop and social event this location is open longer than the close by peets or the other starbucks in the la cumbre mall across the street the staff always keeps a good pace and sets a high standard for the slower starbucks
drive thru is super convenient but can be slow especially during the weekday mornings seems understaffed at times but so far havent had an issue with an order

not up to the high standards of service that most starbucks are know for i ordered a triple grande caramel mach and when i got it it felt like only two thirds full i was in a hurry so i didn t complain as i should have as i was leaving i stopped to go to the restroom and a pregnant young woman coming out warned me there was no toilet paper i went into the other restroom and it was also out of paper and dirty very disconcerting

for the most part this location does a decent job in delivering good temperature appropriate food beverages on many occasions they ve forgotten to give napkins condiments and or handed items out of the window one by one rather than putting everything into a bag i know there s a pandemic going on and shortages on supply but let s think logically and give the customers what they need

i go here all the time and there is literally never the same employees very confusing not sure if it s a training store or what sadly my cloud macchiato was completely wrong today even more sad i expected it because my orders have been messed up in the past every employee i ve come in contact with is super nice though

as others has said this is by far one of the slowest locations i ve ever been at one person working taking orders and working as a cashier the majority of my time in the drive thru was listening to her taking orders a definite need for more help or training my frappe was very good but melted a little while i waited to be served

we stopped in for a iced tea on a very warm day customer service was good my tea was good as well the store felt very warm inside and we ended up going out and sitting in the car with air on to cool off

thank you doth such a place share such an idea with a complement reader seeks a very refined polite female acquaintance who may further an incomplete introduction to society though discreetly background

it s a starbucks you know what their coffee tastes like meh and what their prices are like high so i ll tell you why this became my starbucks they recently renovated the seating and it s a great study spot reliable wifi big tables in the middle a comfy couch in the corner and seating all alongside the window read convenient outlets and people watching huge improvement to the awkward tiny circular tables they had before it can get randomly crowded sometimes why any family would decide to bring all their children here for an afternoon or why a mom would bring teens to drink frappucinos is beyond me the barristas are nice one of them made fun of me for having been there every day for a week when writing the paper that wouldn t die i appreciated that he noticed i still prefer independent coffee shops like citadelle or toast but when i m too lazy to go that far this will do plus i m a sucker for that passion iced tea in the summer get it half sweetened it s better and for it s pretty good

this is my favorite starbucks ever thanks to the barista her name starts with a c i believe who made my drink a double shot on ice perfectly and without a second thought or even an eye roll she seemed happy to be there the manager at the counter however named jeff was absolutely rude to me he acted visibly annoyed with me while taking my order and had a mocking tone to his voice i could tell he didn t want to deal with me i was polite as can be but he definitely woke up on the wrong side of the bed seems to me like the barista and manager should switch positions she is much more customer friendly than he is and served me with sweet hospitality and a warm smile she is the only reason i will return

your typical starbucks a good stop on a nice day while shopping in beautiful suburban square there is plenty of outdoor seating available to enjoy the sun while you self medicate your caffeine addiction

at the drive thru was packed and slow the employee working the drive thru was slow and i had to ask for stir sticks stoppers for the drinks that was odd but not too bad what was bad you ask having to ask for my change i handed her my cash and was expecting almost an entire dollar in change she took my money and said thank you have a nice day my response after starting at her for a few seconds may i have my change confused look from her uhm yeah uhm how much was it again i don t know if you expected the change as a tip or just had a brain fart but seriously give me my change you didn t deserve a tip after making me wait as you screwed up my order took your time on my order and then neglected to give me change i ll skip a return to this location at any time of the day
free wifi free power for devices over priced drinks exactly what you would expect

used to be one of my favorites but a fair number of the staff aren t as friendly as the previous employees i like their product but half of the starbucks attraction is atmosphere and if employees are grumpy it ruins the vibe

oh how i love this starbucks mainly because of where it s located today was my first time to this location it s been long overdue for starbucks in the neighborhood it s very clean nice decor plenty of seats inside and out overall a nice space to enjoy the riverfront the employees were welcoming and friendly they seemed very knowledgeable of the drinks however they were very busy lines were long and the service was slow i ordered the usual grande carmel macchiato it did not taste as if it was made properly i told the barista it tasted funny and they gladly made it again this time it tasted a bit better lol although i did not have the best service today i will go back to give them a second chance if you live in the area definitely give them a try im sure they ll get better with time

i love starbucks and this is two miles from my home but the parking has become impossible last two times i ve been no parking drove across the street to an independent equally good coffee shop i want to be a loyal customer but this location is making it hard don t do business coffee here anymore either no quiet tables for two the staff here is great the space is clean but it needs a bigger space and parking lot

disappointed when i got my vanilla bean frap i asked for extra carmel and i didn t get one drop of carmel the person in drive thru really needs to listen to the customers order and they didn t have enough green tea

not my favorite venue but was in a hurry and needed a caffeine fix starbucks starbucks i never see any differences except location service even the staff seems the same expensive but good coffee what s a girl to do caffeine fixes can reach critical levels

standard issue starbucks coffee tasted about the same as most of the other starbucks i ve been to the seating area inside and outside is relatively large no drive thru prices were about the same and the friendliness factor at starbucks is generally bordering weird as it is
decent latte great quick drive thru what else can you say
not a lot of seating but they get my orders out in a timely manner service is good and it is clean

when i m driving on the this is our stop to make to stretch the legs use el ba o and get a drink it s more about the strategic location than the actual location it s usually dirty on the floor the service is at a minimum and it is average on speed too bad it s not known for the better i hope they raise the bar soon this does not mean that the employees don t care who knows only they do but it does mean that it is sorely lacking when it comes to other more cheerful and clean starbucks
great drinks like any starbucks and great customer service but the bugs flying around are so annoying i can t study do work in the store i have to sit outside because the gnats flies are so present
got a vanilla iced latte with oat milk a chai tea late and a caramel br l e latte they gave me an extremely small cup for the latte and it was still about the cups were also sticky

people working at pm on a thursday one of whom is training we went inside to order our two drinks a honey almondmilk flat white and a mocha frappuccino it took at least minutes to get our drinks now they do have a drive through they had some pre orders and of those people were training but the trainee made our drinks and there were only drinks picked up while we were there it s obvious their priority is with the drive through customers and this is something all of the starbucks seem to do at least in my recent experience their specialty drinks are tasty but overall starbucks brewed coffee is horribly over roasted read burned still when i can t locate a local coffeehouse and there is a starbucks nearby when i need a coffee fix i ll go

a convenient star for this part of the world with access from both street road and second street pike its proximity to some of my favorite restaurants aroi thai blue sage and house of pho make it a perfect quick apr s dinner stop for hot brew on the way to the movies or home it is not the most attractive franchise unit in the area but it serves a functional purpose unlike a box of chocolates you always know what you are going to get

was super excited to have this location here since i could hit the drive by before work to grab coffee i did go inside and it s very small the entrance is shared with the bank however the first time going the service was super slow and there were only customers in line the one barista messed up my friends drink it was remade and she loved it so she didn t complain but my friend had to remind the women to give her a cookie she ordered my nd time going was very pleasant and i used the drive thru very convenient and look forward to coming back
it s as good as any starbucks mediocre at best

this starbucks gets my order correct times out of which is great but this is by far the slowest starbucks i have ever been to i ve gone to this one fairly regularly since they opened and my experience is always the same when the drive through is busy you could wait as long as minutes from ordering to actually getting to the window going inside does not make too much of a difference either this is not to say that the staff is slow they are always working and moving as fast as possible the problem is that they do not have enough staff or kitchen space to keep up with the volume of patrons my recommendation put in a mobile order before you leave your house and it might be ready by the time you get there

first of all i love starbucks my husband and i were looking for coffee the day we left reno we figured any starbucks is the same i was disappointed with this location and had to wait over minutes for two coffees the way it was set up it was awkward to say the least it seemed we had to push chairs out of the way to walk out the one and only door we had to enter the workers were friendly enough but it just seem to take forever and was awkward

i love starbucks but i avoid this one it has some of the slowest service i have ever experienced at a starbucks i was there days ago the guy who was doing the drinks loves to talk to the costumers and his co workers which is fine i just noticed he does a lot of talking and no working too he will stop working and just start talking and talking there was only one person ahead of me and it still took almost minutes to get my drink i also got over charged at one point the price on the menu was lower then the price i was charged i added nothing special to my drink i was going to ask for an explanation or my money back but there was a big line at that point so i let it go small coffee shop not much sitting music can be too loud sometimes on the plus side there is a sweet cece s and a chipotle right next door that s a bonus

it s my local starbucks the staff is always very friendly and has more to say than what do you want has a drive through if it wasnt out of my way i d visit more often man i wish there was another one closer to my house can we get a starbucks at the beach
extremely long wait but grateful for the drive thru staff are pleasant got my drinks right

good overall coffee service notes the main entrance is the same for both the bank right starbucks left my flat white was good but not great and my one wish would be that they add a clover brewing system

i rate this starbucks stars instead of because as another reviewer stated this starbucks tends to be consistently busy and loud on the inside i would not recommend having a meeting interview or phone call here the drive thru is very busy as well and is one of the slower drive thrus i have used at a starbucks the staff is below average and there seems to be a fair amount of attrition i have received more wrong orders here than at other starbucks it is clean on the inside and has nice outdoor seating the large windows to the south make the afternoon sunshine coming in nice

i m used to quality service came back from europe where baristas are awesome i drive about minutes to get to this starbucks and their service is getting worse every time i come here two days in a row i asked for a brownie and chocolate chip cookie at pm and they are out of it those are two main things a coffee shop should have coffee was good tho so i will be taking my business else where can t go to red lion and blvd or the one inside target which is the worst of them all probably try abington area next time

small location inside a rest area but with a full menu the milk and sweeteners are done by the baristas not at a station so make sure to ask for what you need service was slower than at dedicated locations but still fairly friendly not bad for a quick pick me up on the road

incredibly busy constantly i came here a few times during a trip to tulane and visited during the week and on a weekend and it seemed like there was always a line out the door i think because of this the service wasn t the friendliest but i can understand given the sheer volume of orders the outside patio is really nice and would be a great place to work or study i just wish there would have been space the few times i was there

dan is the man at this drive thru actually most of the staff that service the window are friendly personable attentive accurate and prompt but dan adds entertainment to the list good coffee and other drinks not liking the new items offered through la boulange or however you spell it most of the pastries need to be heated to taste good as they are refrigerated or stale tasting otherwise on the plus side they seem to have more offerings than in the past as far as pastry variety quality of food is no where near panera but tops on beverages you will encounter long lines at windows on rush hour parking lot is tough and not driver friendly use caution

this is my morning go to coffee spot before the gym absolutely love james he always has great customer service however the past few times i ve been my coffee is half full i always order a grande and it feels so light i didn t take a single sip from this coffee and finally checked it this time i don t want to sound rude at the drive thru asking for it to be a full cup like i know there s space for whip but my goodness

starbucks on the washu danforth campus bauer hall the business school this means a few things changing hours based on the school calendar when school is not in session it may be closed or open for a short amount of time unpredictable hours if the school has a special event it may be closed lack of seating space during peak hours like lunch time though there are a lot of tables it shares the space with the b school cafe which has a lot of undergraduate and graduate students there all the time you can use the app to pay but can t redeem rewards or order ahead of time for pickup wonderful staff
this starbucks is cramped every time i have been in there the coffee doesn t taste as fresh as other starbucks the staff is friendly but it s certainly not a first choice for me
frequently get lukewarm coffee they always remake the coffee when i have time to go in and ask but this is starbucks they should have hot coffee at all times

quick service very clean i ordered a blonde cappuccino and after the foam i had less then half a drink that s was really disappointing flavor was good just wish i could have had a full cup for the price of starbucks drinks

i guess it was ok i am just use to the staff at my usual sb s remembering me spoiled yes the staff was nice and the coffee exceptional i paid with my iphone app that s always fun i will go back to my usual starbucks from now on

oh man did these guys get a new staff things seem to be served so much slower than in the past i live across the street so it s super convenient and i wouldn t stop coming back but man i have to give myself like extra minutes additional now compared with the old staff

frequent here there is usually a line in the drive thru and subsequent wait today was a it long though i was the only car in line customer service was poor today as well when i did get my non specialized cold beverage the cashier did not look at me and leaned it our the window half tilted this rubbed me the wrong way service is normally better perhaps he was having a bad day inside the store it is clean and cozy the bathrooms are also very clean

spacious clean starbucks located next to st joe s baristas were friendly but a little inefficient people in line and minutes to get my drink hate to see what would happen if the line really started to back up not sure how long this store has been around but it seems pretty new strange hours as it closed at on the day that i visited let s not stay open too late now we might pull in too many college kids in need of a study break
solid stars it was pretty clean to be so populated and they served regular starbucks and did not try to rip me off unlike the starbucks on south broad street

this starbucks in horsham is staffed by friendly baristas who aim to please and you do not get too much of the upsell dont you want something to eat today schtick the drive through window is convenient but it is a pain to get in and outof the parking lot due to the traffic nothing special but nothing wrong with this location

i love starbucks coffee and not all the stores are the same this location is nice because it does have a drive thru window if you just want to get it on the run inside is pretty clean and kept up not very big but there are outdoor tables if you want to sit outside i always ask for my drink extra hot and for some reason this location never has been able to do that for me the parking lot is not very big and is usually crowded since they do share it with other businesses i usually park in the raleys lot and walk over

this is open for a while now and one thing they need to work on is maintaining the condiments counter i m there often and almost always its out of supplies i m also somewhat disappointed that they don t fill the coffee to the top why should i get cup of coffee happened too many times to not say anything about

since i came twice this week i ll write about both experiences earlier i ordered via drive thru the lines are usually long at this location today was lite in comparison even with a lite line their drive thru service can be a bit slow but that could be perspective since we expect things almost instantly in a drive thru line i ordered my iced doppio as usual and it was made perfectly with all of my little additions if you order banana nut loaf ask them to warm it up it will change your world today i ordered an iced doppio and it didn t turn out as expected so they actually have on the menu an iced doppio that comes grande and i think there are things added in it that i m not too fond of so if you want a double espresso just ask for a double espresso i ll have to remember that next time other than that my bacon gouda egg sandwich was great the only negative experience this trip was coming inside the store this time and with only people in front of me it still took while before i was able to order guess i ll have to use the app more to order from this store specifically

not bad not superb just starbucks i love that there s a drive thru but the location is off of the street so it s kind of hard to get here yesterday morning the lid of my frappuccino was not properly applied to the cup so it created a whole mess after i pulled off not cool baristas not cool but i ve been here several times before then and had no problem

this is the fivebucks in the lobby of the big marriott in center city and it gets busy and crowded and messy at the sugar creamer station and attracts a few vagrants who are quickly ushered away from tourist eyes meanwhile i needed a latte and i latte i obtained what a rush try not to come here from am on a weekday mob scene

i have to update my review based on the experience i had on a double star thursday obviously it was a busy morning which is why i placed my order with the mobile app i arrived minutes after the eta i was provided there were at least baristas running around i stood right in front of the mobile order plastic window protector for about minutes without being acknowledged by anyone then another lady came around me and one barista finally came over to ask her first if she s been helped i highly doubt you didn t see my broad shoulders in my large black hoodie sis i just don t know what it is sometimes this location provides outstanding service and then other times you get barely mediocre service at least my eggnogg latte and roasted ham and swiss sandwhich tasted good i asked for shots of espresso in my eggnogg latte but it didn t taste extra charged like i was hoping
this starbucks has probably one of the rudest barista s ever slamming the oven throwing our food down i get that it s early but if you hate your job change it three stars because the coffee is good

this is an average starbucks near the entrance to terminal a and the baggage claim area i have been a couple times while waiting on delayed luggage my order has always been correct so no complaints there there are a few nice chairs to lounge in while burning time

its an average starbucks location i think the best quality is the amount of outlets along the glass wall maybe i m spoiled but the staff at the location closer to my house is really friendly the peeps here not so much not that they are rude or anything just not friendly the wifi kicks me out about every minutes which is annoying they ve recently rearranged the seating area to allow for more space but it feels pretty cramped now they do have a large outdoor patio area which i think is awesome weather permitting

i was starving and needed coffee desperately when i stopped by this location it was a cold day outside so needless to say all the indoor seating was taken the barista was very friendly and was quick about getting my coffee started my spinach wrap was a different story it seemed to take awhile and when they said it was ready it was a breakfast sandwich apparently another customer had taken my wrap the barista apologized and started another wrap for me they served it as soon as it was ready which meant it was super hot the taste was good though not my favorite starbucks location but not bad

more than half of the people here were waiting for their coffee i put in a mobile order and my breakfast sandwhiches were done by the time i arrived however my brewed coffee and green tea took a total of minutes exactly they re down to one espresso machine today but it seemed like there were plenty of staff one person was being trained maybe have someone pour drip coffee and make tea otherwise place seems nice plenty of seating and not too loud

this location usually has an extremely long line but thanks to being early wait time was relatively short all the folks behind the counter were friendly and energetic but they don t have any breakfast sandwiches

we will start with the good this particular starbucks is located just off of i and is open hours a day after that though it kind of heads downhill when we stopped in it was late afternoon and nobody else was in there for whatever reason it still took way too long to make a few simple drinks another reason for the low rating there is no place to really hang out here as there is with just about every starbucks no chairs or couches the place is purely built for you to go in and out and that is all overall just not the starbucks experience i am used to getting

i happen to spend a lot of time and money at this starbucks every time i go i am amazed at how slow the drive thru line moves the lady baristas are ok but jay and guy put them to shame with their impressive customer service skills drinks are inconsistent but beggars can t be choosers

i come here all the time most of the time the staff is on point a few times ive had one particular young lady at the drive thru who just doesn t understand coffee money or customer service tonight in particular i ordered a dirty chai with an extra shot and she told me i was ordering a made up drink ummmm no that s a very common drink served at most coffee shops it s literally on their menu when she went to hand me the drink she just shoved her arm in my car and didn t say a word just hoped i saw her it s very weird and she needs training everyone else is great just not her
this was a typical starbucks service was prompt staff was pleasant

knowledgeable barristas who don t hesitate to give you good service its what you really are paying for at starbucks not the coffee they are always busy but being so close to the movies and off the highway has that effect

you take time to write a review if is really good or the opposite i like this location nothing really that can be criticized other then long lines every time but i like the crowd the outside patio is great but i only give stars because every time i go they misunderstand my order now i learned to read what they write on my cup misspelling my name is fun but me repeating a few time coconut milk please is embarrassing if i see they put my drink in dairy blender i know they got wrong and i ask again some are funny and chat with you make a nice comment but yesterday both girls the one that took order and one made my drink forced me write the review this morning she took a long time to make this mocha frap with coconut milk chat with her coworker that was carrying buckets of ice making jokes between the two got distracted with so many other moves around meantime started like few other drinks literally i saw my drink waiting at every step to get to the next it was in blender for like over minutes because she served a few other drinks she even took time to rinse the blender cup and top before she got a top for my drink to serve it my drink got to me very watery because it was melting already and not much flavor i don t think i had all ingredients in it but i had to run otherwise i would have told them to remake it did not risk it for another long wait what can i say i will go there again because the nice location and very convenient to enjoy a sunny morning

a starbucks is a starbucks is a starbucks and this one is a starbucks that doesn t say much but simultaneously says it all i m a purist with my coffee and always just order coffee no frills there should be a separate line for people like me who order they turn and fill a cup and we are gone i don t even need to go to the separate counter to pick up but i digress this was coffee and it was good
close to the freeway good for travelers good promt service nice drinks like any starbucks mostly close to the freeway

not my favorite usf area starbucks but convenient on my way to work parking is often an issue and many times when i visit the baristas are cleaning or vacuuming or conducting other loud tasks not an ideal location to sit and chat though the seating is plentiful and diverse a couple big comfy chairs a high top a long bar that regulars sit at to chat with the baristas my last visits have been okay one was for a frappuccino that took far too long to make between the baristas working and no one in front of me the guys after me got their drinks before me and they were quite chummy with them meanwhile i m standing there awkwardly waiting the girl doing the register was new and took awhile to ring me up but it was fine last night i wanted a passion tea lemonade and was told they were out of lemonade i was recommended to try a passion tea apple juice and reluctantly agreed then the computer froze up for a minute and i was given it on the house bonus i ll take some free starbucks though i admit i did want the stars on my card lol this one is much less crowded than fowler and not much further from usf i also wish this was drive through or there was some drive through on my way to usf but this one is pretty good fowler is my favorite for the friendliness and speed but this one is good too
this place has the a c on freezer cold bring a sweater everything else seems normal
this place is easy to get to in center city the staffs are friendly and drinks are well made i was able to get in and out quickly not bad

it s starbucks my default rating for fast food chains is stars and they didn t do anything special to rise above that they didn t do anything bad enough to lose a star either though i was seriously tempted to drop one for the lack of drive thru there is at least a parking lot though

starbucks is not really something a challenge in terms of food you know what you re going to get customer service however is very important i ve been coming to the egg harbor greentree starbucks for years as a regular i can say that the staff here is extremely friendly and helpful one issue you may have depends on the time of the day at some points high school lets out and this place can be as loud as a school cafeteria other times several parents decided that this starbucks is a good place to bring their children being in washington township they have the my kid does no wrong attitude and often the parents will allow their infants to cry or their younger children to run around as if this were a daycare it does affect the experience of a nice place to relax with a tasty beverage the service gets a star rating the crowd sometimes kills it though
my once a month place while waiting for my wife s meeting to end always busy a bit noisy but if i xan sit in the comfy chair im happy friendly baristas

this review regards this location not the amazing food and drinks this starbucks is a local hangout for high schools like baldwin and shipley i think that everyone agrees that their parking lot is atrocious it is impossible to find parking especially in the morning it is always hard to sit down and some on the seating in the left side of the starbucks is really weird there are two big tables that are simply awkward some of the baristas there is super friendly but it isn t rare that i get a non attentive barista

the best thing about this starbucks is seeing the line of cars wrapped around the building as you walk inside to no line the worst part waiting because everyone working is handling all the requests from the drive thru other than that it s an average starbucks with the usual offerings
always good service need plant based food options all locations i have noticed much better snacks

i just love having a bit of heaven in a cup on my way to work in the morning such a treat this location is brightly lit clean and roomy everyone we ve met there has been friendly and helpful the store is gearing up for christmas and have added some pretty nice shiny bits free wi fi nice location and great company while enjoying my hot beverage what more can i ask
this starbucks was ok small cramped and people lounge everywhere so there was no where to sit the staff seemed gossipy and distracted not my favorite one i will stop here on an as needed basis

parking is a challenge because it s so busy outlets to work off of are not easily accessible like at other locations i don t think i ll be back here anytime soon i don t like the layout here havertown is so much better in that regard
i have gotten my usual vente americano here they did a fine job makes me want to grab some every time before i shop

i have to comment on the drive thru service folks i continue to have the unfortunate pleasure of being served by ladies who seem to dislike working at starbucks never been to a starbucks where customer service was just disappointing and boring i might as well been served at a dmv many of us enjoy the idea of ordering from starbucks and having us a fancy drink being served by a friendly upbeat employee i continue to be robbed of such experience please switch out the drive thru ladies
very large plenty of study space friendly attentive staff very very very cold staff said they have no control over the heat everyone had their winter coats on i had to leave it was so cold

this location usually very busy seating is decent the problem is for some reason the customers here all think they live in beverly hills and shouldn t have to wait or suffer the fools behind the counters the employees here have always treated me well

this is a review for the charbucks next to the wyndham garden inn on route in exton this starbucks is walk able from there and literally saved me throughout the weekend of a conference where i was forced to stay at the wymdham i came here for breakfast got some decent coffee and a breakfast sandwich which beat the heck out of the pre packaged grab go garbage that the hotel was offering i alsostopped in around pm during a break in the conference and got a much needed macchiatto sp thank you fourbucks

i like this starbucks as others have said it s true some of the barista s can be slightly slow moving i ve been here about x s only though so i may not be completely right about that i think i ve ordered frappacinnos only which i always thought were well made there s a parking lot that s a nice thing as street parking is metered off topic there s a ups zesto pizza in this retail fixture i ve been to the pizzeria only once but really liked it got slices nice portion sizes so much took third one home

right on main street in new hope nice outside seating although your view is of the intersection quick service with a smile and the typical starbucks quality no parking at the store since it on main street so don t think you are going to just pull into the parking lot and run in
great customer service on every visit the employees ate always so chipper they make my visit thru the drive thru great

i love this place i spend a lot of time here yes i drink a lot of coffee and tea to add a needs improvement comment i think this location would serve its customers better if they spent more time on cleanliness they really need an employee to address the trash cans which aren t emptied until they re overflowing they really need an employee to walk the floor with a dust mop picking up paper scraps dropped napkins and the like they really need an employee to wipe down each table they really need an employee to address the restrooms refilling tissue seat covers soap and sweeping the floor the manager is very nonchalant and appears to not notice these problems in a place with such a revolving door of customers all day every day cleanliness should be priority one add the recent virus outbreaks in the news and i d say sanitizers should be everywhere if i were managing the above items would be addressed times a day between rushes i still love them though

this starbucks is in a cute little part of webster groves next to gazebo park where events and farmers markets are held in summer it s just like any other starbucks but this is right next to my work so i go there all the time usually around pm when i hit the afternoon slump the staff are friendly and always prompt with my order and they rarely mess it up my go to drinks are the white chocolate mocha with non fat milk and no whipped cream as well as the java chip frappacino skinny and without whipped cream the clientele at this location are a mixture of business people hippies young teens nerinx hall an all girls high school is just around the corner university students webster university is within walking distance artists entrepreneurs and stay at home moms you really get a mixed bag here i typically don t sit and stay to drink my lattes but when i have in the past the furniture is comfy with a variety of seating choices for individuals or small groups and the place is kept clean and orderly it doesn t wow my pants off but it maintains the high standard of starbucks that i expect a solid standby

stars mostly only for shock value let me preface this by saying that i am not a fan of starbucks i think their coffee is over caffeinated and often burnt their espresso drinks lame at best and everything over priced in fact when i am trying to decide on a cafe to go to starbucks doesn t even make it to the list of options however i must admit that starbucks is extremely convenient they are everywhere and they are open late so when i needed to find a place to study late tonight i decided to go to the green hills starbucks for the first time in maybe years so i walked in tonight with my friend and i couldn t stop my jaw from dropping over and over again and the exclamation wow from coming out of my mouth why because the place has gotten an extreme makeover it s probably to do with the whole new starbucks branding marketing goals but anyway all of the furniture has been replaced with wooden counterparts and comfy couches it has an entirely different feel less commercial and more local and authentic the gigantic study table with electrical outlets has been replaced by benches on the wall bar stools and any other kind of seating you can imagine and the outlets are now impossible to find because they have been painted the same exact brown as the wall which led me to create an extremely awkward situation as i walked around the entire border of the room looking for a plug for my dying laptop despite an inspiring renovation of the entire atmosphere of the place obviously the quality of the drinks has not improved astonished by the new look i inquired the barista about when they redid the place to which she replied last year in february embarrassed i chuckled took my drink and slowly walked away clearly i am behind the times anyway great new feel and atmosphere this one is much more social for starbucks even though the drinks haven t changed so if you must resort to going to starbucks this is the one i would recommend

my current star review of this starbucks location is based on a recent visit at the location and could change based on future visits i really enjoy getting their pike place coffee and the spicy chorizo sandwich or the bacon and gouda sandwich for breakfast but one morning i wanted to switch it up and ordered the steak breakfast wrap and put my order in through the mobile app when my wife and i arrived to pickup our order she had gone inside to get our food and drinks when she got inside there was a note on a bag that said see the cashier my wife was confused and asked the worker at the counter what the note meant and they told my wife to go wait in the cashier line for help after waiting in line the cashier informed her that they were out of the wrap and that they could make something else instead my wife proceed to request a bacon and gouda sandwich and waited five minutes without anyone working on the sandwich she went up to the worker who was making the food and asked when the sandwich would be done the worker then threw down the tongs and said they would get to it right away in a somewhat attitude like voice after waiting a total of minutes for a sandwich when we had put the mobile order in minutes earlier this was a pretty big let down if we decide to come back to this location i will update my review as it reflects on the most recent service which i hope will be better than the last time

place is always really busy but everyone there is really nice one guy i think his name is grant is super super fun to talk to store manager is super sweet overall everyone is really nice just slow

service is fine but the quality of their drinks are mediocre at best i would not recommend getting their iced coffee i ve tasted better iced coffee when i made it myself at a hotel their iced lattes are ok but not worth the price only satisfying drink i ve had there has been the pink drink but way too much ice even when i asked for light ice i never bought food from there because i always saw flies buzzing around the food in the display case unsanitary much and my final thought applies to starbucks overall their drinks should be cheaper or at least make the size difference between a tall and a grande greater

so this is the starbucks in tampa s f terminal which happens to be a starbucks reserve they have the reserve clover brewed coffee ultimately it was a little disappointing because i mistakenly thought all reserve locations also had the nitro cold brew i didn t snap a picture but it seems like they ve also significantly downsized from their renovation a year ago there wasn t any starbucks specific seating and i felt squished waiting in line for my drink other than that it was on par with any other location

i ordered a traveler for a meeting a traveler is a cardboard box full of delicious whatever you want i get the blonde roast cause that s what those brainy people like i ve worked here at the tgh for years and love that there is a place like this here it s a safe haven for employees and patient family alike stepping into another world for a break from life i called at night to order my traveler it wasn t ordered in the morning so i was late to my meeting made me look bad but i still love this place

pumpkin spice season i love starbucks and when i relocated to south jersey i knew it was probable that one would not be as close as i had out in san diego a drive thru one blocks away well the closest one is about miles and so when i m in the area and feel like treating myself i stop in this location is usually busy but there is ample parking and the baristas are usually quick getting the orders out i think that the service kind of depends with who you get and if theyre having a good day or not i have had the friendliest service to at times indifference and even a little snobby so customer service is inconsistent which is disheartening because like i said i am a fan of starbucks this location does have a decent offering of baked goods and food items as well and the usual starbucks swag available for purchase

the baristas here are outstanding they re friendly and make grabbing coffee here very pleasant and yet the parking is so atrociously awful i often drive to this location see that there is no parking and then head somewhere else for coffee there is no place to wait for a spot and i ve even been double parked into a spot before it s just a disaster

wow the drive thru was crazy long and there s very little parking i parked and walked in can can t believe those people wait in the drive thru that long i think it was a bank a long time ago shared with jimmy john s
just fyi for people who like to work and study in coffee shops this one only has one table with an outlet nearby which sucks it s a really nice clean environment otherwise

should have stopped anywhere before here stopped for a smoothie thought i d get one with protein and skip a full lunch ordered the strawberry banana and a banana nut bread twenty mins later after i watch him pick up and put down my cup and make coffees for people that came in several minutes after i came barista hands me some coffee drink that s a smoothie oh i read it wrong then he goes to make to come back and tell me they don t have the right protein and asked if i want the new protein sure as long as there is no dairy he proceeds to dump in scoops then before mixing it turns to tell me that oh it does have milk in it uhm yeah that s a problem so now he s on his third remake of my drink so no joke and less exaggeration it took nearly min for one drink in w store with two people in front of me and one behind me who walked out before me i could have gotten a full meal at panera way faster next time

this is the closest starbucks to my house not bad most of the time standard they drive me crazy cause i request light ice on cold drinks as they fill the cup and you end up with about a third of a cup of fluid if i don t get light ice the dollar drink is gone by the time i get home ordered light ice today and they filled the cup i think i ll just skip this starbucks and stop at one where i m not paying for ice instead of a beverage
so i was pushed to pay for my coffee by the cashier before i was able to order food and then the line was people long while i loved my coffee it seems like she could have switched registers

if i were rating this solely based on the amazing individuals that work at this location then believe me you d see the biggest stars possible these employees get hounded daily by huge lines of obnoxious students i ve seen them be berated i ve seen them when they re flustered and i ve seen the way a lot of jerks treat them i absolutely love every employee here and hope that everyone else appreciates them since this location is at the ua and on campus right by the library it gets slammed throughout the day there are times where there are lines that go people out the door and the employees here continue to bust butt to get drink orders out unfortunately the ua has set them up for failure by also having an advanced ordering app not the regular starbucks app they don t do that at this location where while there are people in line there are then college students in classes also ordering drinks so at certain times of the day the in person customers are getting angry because tap and go customers are getting drinks before the in person orders but imagine how hard it is for these few employees to keep up with the people in line and the mobile orders happening at the same time really ua has set them up for failure because people get cranky and take it out on these poor baristas who are doing amazing work unfortunately i have to deduct a star for the long long wait times and for the fact that i think its a horrible business practice to have all of these different ordering systems slamming people but again still stars for the employees they don t let you redeem your stars for a free beverage here that s frustrating you can however still get happy hour deals and other perks here i mainly earn my stars here and then cash them out at regular locations what i really hate about this location is how they nickle and dime you i switch out the milk for soy or coconut in all of my beverages the upcharge for this is fine as i appreciate them offering soy and i realize that costs them a bit more to make i have zero issues with this but what irks me is i used to order drinks with no ice and i d have no issues the ice makes things too cold for me to drink but sometimes i want something that isn t hot either no ice is a great way to get something closer to room temp again i ve ordered like this several times with no issues and i ve never had an issue at any other location ever but suddenly i m told there is a cent upcharge here for no ice they re actually trying to charge you to take ice out of your drink i ve just saved you some water some ice the power it took to make the ice etc and the coffee i m purchasing is around and i usually purchase here x a week x a day that s drinks a week a loyal customer and you really really want to charge someone to take ice out of a drink this new rule comes and goes sometimes they have it other times they don t but basically they need to get over all of their extra charges that don t exist anywhere else seriously this doesn t exist at any other regular or franchise location i ve ever been to at some point you need to realize you re making plenty of money and you don t need to charge to remove ice after all i don t get a discount if i take whipped cream off of my drink employees stars long waits and weird mysterious extra charges stars greed of this location no stars

this been a regular stop on the way to work for me going on years now up front the three stars are for the staff however a couple drag the rest down one with a regularly flippant attitude another common occurrence is at the point of sale when hot food items are ordered the patron s name is not asked and when the order comes a weak callout is made with only the name of the food and consequently not heard in restaurant over the often loud music and sometimes the sound level of the staff having a good time at work i love seeing happy employees so perhaps this is a fair trade off however a half warm breakfast sandwich tastes like hell often they do not have in stock breakfast items like the heated sandwiches who does the ordering and for that matter is there a manager even present seeing to these and the following glaring indiscretions as for the condition of the restaurant i d have to say it s a bit dirty and unattended the window exteriors appear to not have been cleaned since the remodel the window interiors are not far behind the tables don t get wiped on a regular basis through the morning as well as the floor swept and debris remaining throughout the morning it doesn t appear that it s mopped nightly either the supply station is often out of items as i have observed often on my numerous visits at am the condition of the floors as described herein unswept and still showing the signs of the previous business day i did ask about this once and was told oh we got hammered this morning again am and i look around seeing that i was one of three people in the place and but two cars in line outside the staff kids partying it up really as said there is good people working there that take a personal pride in the job they do but all that goes out the door given the aforementioned issues a manager that isn t busy behind the counter preparing orders to oversee that the place is taken care of would be a start a good hard cleaning of the entire restaurant inside and out including the filthy paved areas outside including the furniture is more than overdue i suggest steam cleaning and sterilization can anyone say reset
i just a iced carmel coffee delicious refreshing made perfect starbucks is the best

definitely not my favorite starbucks but the location in conshy right next to the giant is fairly convenient don t expect to lounge around here it s tight and there s not much room for studying or doing work in the afternoon tables may be empty but aren t always clean still service is generally friendly and fast

okay location compared to newtown and other locations baristas are rude and that is my only complaint about this starbucks drinks are good if you don t care about service you shouldn t have a problem going here
this is not my favorite spot but it serves its purpose the crew are fast friendly and efficient i do not hesitate stopping here again it can be hairy getting in and out at busier times of the day
love starbucks love their coffee but crystal was extremely rude at the cash register today i hope i never come here again if she s working definitely needs to be trained on customer service

minus star for not giving me a paper protector for my cup seriously you hand me a cup in the drive thru over my head with no thingy not sure if it s an idaho thing to save the environment but really drive thru wasn t bad staff was friendly drink was as expected and it is around the corner from the gym i go to in the morning i ll be here more often

cute cozy starbucks i m only giving it three stars because of the music no one comes to a cafe to listen to every song taylor swift ever wrote people come to cafes to write read study think or talk the lyrics to you belong with me breathe red i knew you were trouble bad blood etc are not conducive to these activities some cafes play song selections that are i wish this location was one of them

it was decent that s about all they seemed to not know how to make an oatmeal or open a new carton of coconut milk my dying son found nothing on the menu appetizing and soon after leaving had to throw up was it the service that made him nauseous the food the terminal disease that s eating away at his organs no one can be sure one thing i can be sure of though is that i ll be visiting this starbucks again because the other option is mcdonald s coffee and that s doodoo pure doo doo

not bad service just weird it s a pleasant place to relax and get some work done the staff is just very self involved i don t want to hear about your weekend construction and trips to the library just a coffee
standard starbucks clean free wifi friendly staff

this starbucks brings me back to the old school days me and hubby used to come to this location all the time our all time favorite is the white chocolate mocha we used to sip on that and chat upstairs at their lounge section very often this is probably my favorite starbucks since it brung me so much memories since is my favorite why stars i ve been checking in quite a bit lately their drinks are either hit or miss for example i ve been getting the matcha green tea latte sometimes the drink is just right but other times the barista probably didn t shake it enough resulting in chunks of powder at the bottom of the cup sometimes the whipped cream looks so nice while others cheap stingy looking
the atmosphere is nice but the staff was not helpful and did not take my name they appeared new or understaffed as they did not know what i asked for not what i expect out of starbucks

starbucks is supposed to be starbucks i m not sure why they can t seem to follow the recipe that they were trained to follow i don t order anything extra or special and about of the time it seems that they ve added too many pumps to the drink i should just stick with my neighborhood starbucks

if this were your first experience of the starbucks franchise you would walk away neither overly impressed nor depressed for those of us who ve easily been in dozens of them the feeling is about the same in our particular case this week it was a necessary evil we were trying to locate yet another tourist attraction this sounds like complaining but trust me we were having a fabulous time and the iphone and its handy gps were nearly dead so we ducked into starbucks for a drink and a good long battery charge i d never had a starbucks smoothie before and i ll never have one again it was just not like a real smoothie no fruit chunks no bold fruit flavors nothin interesting and a strong preservative taste to seal the deal but chances are i d have said the same thing if i d gone to any other starbucks nationwide so don t take that the wrong way the girls behind the counter were loud and goofy but at least they were having fun at work plenty of parking out front
i love starbucks yes i do what i don t love is that i cannot as of yet redeem my starbucks rewards on my smart phone app inside a starbucks target

i love starbucks and this is definitely one of the nicer ones i have been to in my travels but the one thing i can say is that no matter how busy they are it always takes longer for me to get my drink here than at any other starbucks i m just not sure why maybe it s just the mood i m in today haha staff is super nice though
stars because the counter people are nice because they have no drive thru because they have no food
service was great as always my fav ginger josh wasn t there though nothing like a true north first thing in the morning

they have never messed up an order but they need to update their hours they are not open until pm on sundays i pulled up to the drive thru at pm and they told me that they were closed for the night i was kind of sad after i drove all the way out to edwardsville just for starbucks

i have been to this starbucks on several occasions and have not had very good customer service maybe it is because i am going thru the drive thru i always feels like i am annoying them or they are doing me some huge favor my drink was consistent with other starbucks and service was done in a timely manner

i m a frequent visitor to many of the locations around my area i usually order the same thing skinny vanilla latte and a breakfast sandwich i went through the the drive up and was greeted by a very friendly barista while i waited she chatted me up and was peppy for the am hour i was pretty tired and her contagious attitude helped pep me up when i got my drink i gave it a sip and tasted awful like burnt coffee i went in and out when i explained it didn t taste right the manager took it right away apologizing and had the other barista make a new one his demeanor was very different and was disgruntled having to make a new one when i got the new one it tasted the exact same i was sorely disappointed that drink went to waste they could have had stars but when you can t make a standard staple drink on your menu that s a problem

this is a standard starbucks location i got a beverage here and got the exact experience that i expected from my visit especially as i ordered on the app i don t really have much else to say about this location as i ve only visited it once or twice ever

definitely not the best location i was thinking with it being so new maybe that s what kept everyone continuously slow and rude i decided to just start going inside due to that being much quicker than the drive thru there are two blonde guys who work there that are amazing and have a great personality but every woman that i ve come across there is just mean hopefully it picks up and their attitudes improve but for now i m sticking to my coffee and tea at home
we always forget about this starbucks when we are working in town but happened to be able to stop here to use the wifi for work and enjoy a cup of brew wasn t busy at all which we liked

this starbucks is still just a solid stars they get the job done but without any extra pizzaz in customer service i stopped in to pick up a grande cold brew before my class over at the apple store the cashier was very dry to be honest i do not remember her even thanking me or ordering the wait for my beverage was minimal considering two others were ahead of me in line the young lady who presented me my drink did thank me for coming in so i figured it was her job to say thanks i wish starbucks would go to paper straws or the new lids that are like a travel mug and do away with the plastic straws will i return only if i am taking a class at the apple store when february why liquid refreshment for class

i come here every morning to order my breakfast depending on who is staffed the drinks can be hit or miss i think the caffeinated drinks are way too strong and needs to be mixed with decade coffee i had to order skinny drinks because the the originals had too much sugar caffeine and some of the food has too much sodium

pros the staff here are super friendly and maintain their composure during very busy times cons it often takes minutes to get a regular or iced coffee if you order at the counter also some of the staff seem to have a knowledge gap when it comes to drinks and such one guy was unsure how many espresso shots were in a drink and another person didn t know which sugar free syrups you had and just said i think it s only vanilla he didn t bother to ask or check however the most frustrating thing is the qa with some of the products the last few times i have been in there the iced coffee was practically see through it was so light it seems like they added too much water to it i ve been drinking black iced coffee at starbucks for about years at locations all over the country so i m not just being a karen i ve actually had to ask them to replace it with cold brew which usually looks better i want to give them stars because most of the people are nice overall but some of the service aspects are lacking hope they fix these things

not my favorite location lines are always too long in the mornings and they take forever to take your order then to fill it barista s constant talking to each other about non starbucks related orders are annoying and could be partly responsible for their lack of attention to details the drive thru starbucks up the street is even worse so i guess this is the best city line has to offer

this is a great starbucks location right off of i it is open hours and has a quick drive thru you can t miss the location as there is a giant starbucks sign viewable as you approach the exit i have had no problems here with the quality of the coffee or speed of service as both have been great my only complaint would be with the friendliness of the staff serving the drinks some cheerfulness and politeness goes a long way the last time i came in it seemed more like they didn t really even want to be there

a starbucks like any other starbucks this is the one i visit when i work in the mall and there isn t anything special about it but there s nothing i have found particularly awful either i mostly visit here as oppossed to tim hortons or seond cup because of the my starbucks rewards program the lineups can get pretty ridiculous obviously since it s in a mall they also tend to have only one person on till even when it does get crazy which is a bit annoying especially if you re going there on your break and don t exactly have minutes to spend standing in line to order and again waiting for that order but most of the servers i ve had have been very friendly and good at their jobs there are one or two there that i dread getting but that s the same anywhere my coffee usually tastes just as i expect it to and only once or twice have they gotten anything on my order wrong and they are always happy to fix it a good option if you re in the mall and want a drink or snack though don t hold out hope of them having the new ish bistro boxes in stock they re sold out more often than not

this starbucks has all the good starbucks taste you would expect but the workers are often chatting about who they are going to get fired next making them take longer on your order if you find it funny this might be a good thing otherwise there are better starbucks out there

so i m doing the keto thang and what other way to try to stick to a meal plan than buy trying different sugar free drinks i ve tried it several locations and this location was one of the worst at making it look like diet crap they did not mix the heavy cream and it made it look like spoiled milk was added to my drink i asked the barista and she brushed me off by saying that s what you ordered but did you have to make it look so nasty next visit they got it right
the espresso shots weren t as strong as they usually are in other starbucks locations i found this disappointing since i really needed the shots to wake myself up for a long drive

i feel like this starbucks should not have a drive thru it s pretty awkward the way it is set up and people sometimes cannot back out of parking spaces the line gets very long and out into central ave many mornings everyone who works here is very friendly however service is at times inconsistent this is my neighborhood starbucks i visit every other day i think it would be much better if it were set up similar to the th street and th ave location

i ve only been in here once but the baristas are super friendly and chatty i really appreciate it because a lot of people in the university area seem to hate the students it closes late at midnight and it s got two floors i love starbucks you always know what you re going to get

they be slow even for regular coffee they put their priorities on the drive through rather than the people who take the time to come inside which i think is pretty fucked up the place is clean tho which is nice

adequate describes this location perfectly the barista said they were unable to accept starbucks rewards because they are affiliated with the hyatt hotel and not starbucks i m not sure why they can scan my starbucks card for payment but not scan for rewards service was quick and lots of seating areas but tables and chairs were filled with crumbs and a bit challenging to find a clean spot only came here because we needed a cool drink after wandering around the arch park

if i m paying for a specialty drink i expect them to fill it to the top i go to this starbucks all the time and sometimes they are great and other times they struggle i normally complain but i didn t have time today it s ridiculous give the customer what they are paying for

this starbucks is always busy and packed but mostly because it s the size of a large closet there are only three tables in the whole joint and i m sure that s on purpose with the number of people shuffling in and out it s tough to be productive fortunately they have more tables outside so if the weather is nice you can enjoy some great sites of indianapolis downtown circle

the coffee is good here and the car line typically moves efficiently if you re in the mood for a good convenient coffee this starbucks works well i haven t been inside so i can t vouch for the interior service or setting

nice cool spot always never know what type of entertainment you might get in there with it being downtown on meridian only thing i ordered what i usually order at other locations and it tasted slightly different white chocolate mocha latte not sure what was up with that

the drive thru here can be sssssoooooo slow but is awesome and as andrew s said if you wait to long you might get a free java outta the deal but that has only happened once to my dozens of times of waiting minutes for a cup of joe

one of the best things that this starbucks has going for it is its drive through and friendly service it s fast and efficient depending on how crowded it gets the line can get ridiculous because of how the traffic can flow into the strip mall that this starbucks is located in which can be a pain to get into if you happen to be on the opposite side of the street and trying to cross traffic if you chose to go inside parking can be tight especially during the the morning if there is no parking in front you can park behind the store itself and walk a little the inside has a few tables to sit but space is at a premium especially when crowded the line for orders can sometime merge together when the weather is nice there is a small patio with a few tables and chairs that allow you to watch pendleton pike traffic while enjoying your caffeine

this starbucks has an awful high turnover rate and training new people tends to slow down the delivery of orders there was once upon a time when this location had a steady crew with the two kims working here they were very friendly consistent in their barista skills and super accommodating when they failed us which was very rare now it s a sure hit or miss and i have to pray to the sweet baby jesus above that these baristas get it right so far it s been pretty good but unlike today they had no product for my pink refresher and the new store in algiers had no splenda i opted for the violet refresher in lieu of pink lol and it doesn t taste bad at all needless to say this is my neighborhood starbucks and we ve forged a good friendship with sandy who s been there a while and i look forward to her making our drinks

i was originally going to keep this short sweet you know an espresso with lumps of sugar and stars then i got to thinking about starbucks they were the originators of the chain specialty coffee shops they have grown by leaps and bounds and managed to make money they are a fortune company that has stayed independent with out being franchised new opportunities are available for having a starbucks inside a business hotel or hospital i think starbucks is grossly overpriced why do i say that if i order an espresso in a fine dining restaurant i pay that and more i am unusual in the fact that i love coffee good strong colombian coffee period i make that at home so i do not see the sense in buying it out i also have an espresso machine i am not into lattes or cappuccino s they have a new line of hot chocolates that are sure to be a hit i have had the opportunity to try many of their sandwiches which come into the starbucks already made the ones i have had are very good i also love their breads the multi grain berry bread with egg salad is exceptional their muffins are wonderful but they re still overpriced

i stopped by this starbucks a couple days ago to get my free drink from my rewards upon entering i was greeted with a friendly hello and i was glad to see no line the food selection was the same as any other starbucks and i got my drink after a slightly longer wait that usual i ordered a venti caramel frap with two shots of expresso and extra caramel drizzle the taste was fine but as i was walking to my car the drink ended up turning into a latte there wasn t a lot of ice and i m sure it didn t melt in the cold reno weather overall this place is a solid choice if you want a starbucks drink

i m conflicted on this review it is obvious by my check in s here that i am a fan of starbucks however the customer service at this location seems to be lacking there was a time when they were a lot better but in the last few months it has been declining let me start by the presentation of my drink my paper coffee cup shouldn t look like it was dipped in the coffee there shouldn t be coffee around the rim of the lid either second they have a hard time getting my order right lately i order the same damn thing every time a tall with splenda and light ice and a grande with splenda my issue is they always forget the light ice light ice doesn t mean one ice cube in my drink i order light ice because i want to immediately drink my coffee and not have to worry about rd degree burns if my coffee has light ice it shouldn t burn my mouth and make me use profanity other than that it s a starbucks

it s nearly always too busy which i suppose is just a thing to deal with when not too busy it s a lovely place to sit and enjoy a tasty beverage with a friend or with a book they have a deck so in the summer they double their seating capacity so long as the mosquitoes aren t biting i ve been there several times and have received adequate service yesterday i wanted their egg whites feta and spinach sandwich it was unavailable and so the person apologized and then removed the sample from their display this tells me they care about their customers the fellow making the drinks needed help though there were people waiting for drinks by the time i joined the line
place is cute but there s a rude older woman that works here everyone else seemed nice though

i really liked coming to this location however lately going inside customer service has gone downhill load music unfriendly staff no connection with people drive thru is better and one of the fastest hit miss on the drinks sometimes you get more foam than drink the last one i got was not even full so i paid for a grande and got a tall in large cup no good at all hopefully things will change

so me and my son were at this morning and as we were picking up his order this young lady was slightly rude and threw his straw on the counter and we left so i will be contacting the store manager to let them know what happened

i m a starbucks fanatic and i like to share the love around to all the different locations meaning i need one around everywhere i go or i m lost and sad lol well i happened to be heading to help out at a stray rescue adoption event in fenton and swung by this starbucks to grab a venti pumpkin cream cold brew amazing thing first thing i noticed was that these weren t happy people the staff was unsmiling and there were so many behind the counter that they were tripping over each other of course the lady in front of me in line was being a not nice person so i m sure that didn t help she wasn t nice when she came back in because her order was wrong either karma or was it lol the manager i m pretty certain she was the manager made a comment about it loud enough for everyone to hear which was very unprofessional in my opinion my drink which took forever was delicious my experience not so much

from am to pm this is the best starbucks in all of reno the coffee is hot the service is fast and pleasent and the drinks are made correct any time after pm the service go hell in a hand bag i have stopped by for a cup of coffee and they have no fresh coffee they have to brew it give me a break what coffee place at pm doesn t have coffee this place

i ordered the green tea latte but with a cappuccino ratio of milk unfortunately the cashier wrote latte half foam so i got a very heavy drink i explained the miscommunication to the barista she knew exactly what i wanted and remade it perfectly stars for the young lady

my absolute biggest issue with this store is their mobile ordering what s the point of putting in my order if i still have to wait min for you to acknowledge that i m standing at the pickup area waiting for my coffee that s cold by the time i get it put the orders in the same place as the rest and not behind the counter

i have been going to this starbucks for years seven i have no complaints regarding my drinks i order a variety of concoctions so it s never the same thing for me they do a good job and even when i have to tell them how to make it they typically do a great job so drink wise they get stars but the slightly more mature gentleman that they have working the window has absolutely horrible customer service skills whenever i great him he never says hello back he just gives me a total for my drink he has never said you re welcome even after being told thank you which i do every time today i asked for my receipt and he said the receipt machine isn t working very curtly while never looking at me i can absolutely understand having an off day we all have them it s not great to have them when you work in the customer service industry especially when you re dealing with hundreds of customers a day but it can happen unfortunately he has made me go out of my way to a different location because of his rudeness i don t know if that s his natural personality and demeanor and he s like that with everyone or if he chooses to be like that only with people that are not of his skin color but whatever the reasoning is his customer service skills need to be addressed i have never had this issue in avon or at the one on th st and lafayette rd it s only him at the th st location i m even considering calling and making a verbal complaint because no one should have to be subjected to that

this location is quite hit and miss i don t recommend the drive thru here plus it s an inconvenient parking lot if you re trying to grab a quick cup of joe that being said if you re meeting a friend for a leisurely coffee date this location might be the right one for you slower paced and not very busy
service use to be stars been times recently they re always out of the protein boxes and chicken sausage breakfast wraps i have yet to find they keep these items stocked the summit starbucks is stars

i like to refer to this location as a manhattan style starbucks because it s size and general atmosphere remind me of multiple locations found on the upper west side today there wasn t much seating available as this location is on a university campus and there were a number of students and faculty lingering with their drinks while focusing diligently on various papers books and laptop screens even so i was able to walk right up to the register and order a hot chocolate surprisingly in a good way my drink was not blisteringly hot rather it was at a temperature that allowed me to enjoy a hot drink on a cold day as soon as i had it in my hand

the location and atmosphere are fine it s a mall location i just feel bad for the girl rosie she is miserable at her job and tries to make the feeling mutual u pick ur job love u don t have to hate life n people don t want that vibe notrosie

i live around the corner so i go to this location frequently i don t judge them on their packed drive through or parking lot it s the way most things are in seminole heights my problem with this location is that every time that i visit it after around am they are out of everything milk food cold brew flavor syrups literally everything it s really frustrating to wait in that long drive through line only to find out that they are out of milk
